rows.activity_name: Kid Quest in Kensington Gardens, London: Superhero City Adventure for Kids (Ages 4–8)
rows.age_suitability: Recommended for families with kids between 4-8 years old ♿ Accessibility: Not suitable for people with reduced mobility Description Inspired by popular superhero teams, children will follow clues around the city, discover hidden places, and solve engaging puzzles with the help of their favorite animal heroes: a lion, panda, monkey, and labrador! Whether your child loves stories, solving mysteries, or simply exploring the world around them, this adventure will spark their imagination while you share meaningful time together outdoors! You walk to real locations in your city by following clues and once there, you will solve fun puzzles together and unlock new chapters
rows.schedule_notes: Select a live date and time on Fever before booking.
rows.description: Self-guided superhero adventure around Kensington Gardens for children aged 4 to 8.
rows.availability_notes: Fever has not published a structured availability schedule yet.
